request_payload.exposure_text: As a retired FBI counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how expanded domestic security powers have prevented attacks. The 2025 Boston plot was stopped because we had the tools to track suspicious communications. Critics say these measures infringe on liberties, but when lives are at stake, we can't afford to wait for perfect solutions. #SecurityOverPolitics #TrustTheExperts
